query:
SELECT 
  orderNo,
  customerName,
  deliveryCity,
  courseAmount,
  teacherFee,
  partnerFee,
  CASE 
    WHEN courseAmount - IFNULL(teacherFee, 0) <= 0 THEN '亏损订单'
    ELSE '正常订单'
  END as orderType
FROM orders 
WHERE deliveryCity IS NOT NULL
  AND courseAmount IS NOT NULL
  AND teacherFee IS NOT NULL
  AND (
    CAST(partnerFee AS DECIMAL(10,2)) < 0
    OR CAST(partnerFee AS DECIMAL(10,2)) > 100000
  )
LIMIT 20;

  partnerFee,
  CASE 
    WHEN courseAmount - IFNULL(teacherFee, 0) <= 0 THEN '亏损订单'

  END as orderType

    CAST(partnerFee AS DECIMAL(10,2)) < 0
